---
name: Debunk a misconception
about: Propose a myth or misconception about AI that should be debunked
title: "[MYTH] Debunk: \"[Common misconception]\""
labels: myth
assignees: ''

---

## The Misconception
[State the myth as practitioners commonly express it. Use quotation marks.]

## How Widespread Is This?
[How often do you encounter this belief? Is it common among specific groups (engineers, PMs, executives)?]

## What's Actually Happening?
[The reality: what the mechanism actually is, with specific details. Cite papers, models, techniques if applicable.]

## Why It Matters
[Practical consequence: How does getting this wrong change what people build or how they operate?]

## Citations or Evidence
[Papers, models, techniques that demonstrate the reality. Links preferred.]

## Related Myths
[Are there existing myths in the file that overlap or relate to this one?]

## Additional Context
[Anything else we should consider?]
